summary: The student asked for a definition of disaster recovery. The assistant explained that disaster recovery (DR) is an organization's ability to restore IT infrastructure functionality after a disaster. The assistant further clarified that DR is part of business continuity, focusing on the quick restoration of IT systems for critical business operations. The assistant also defined a disaster recovery plan (DRP) as a structured, documented approach to resuming operations after an incident and noted that a DRP is a key part of a business continuity plan (BCP).
